# ImageToURL

> ImageToURL (imagetourl.cloud) is a free image hosting service that converts uploaded images into permanent, shareable CDN-backed URLs. No account is required for basic use.

## What It Does
- Accepts JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, SVG files up to 10 MB (50 MB on Business plan)
- Returns a permanent HTTPS URL served via a global edge network
- Supports anonymous uploads, API access, and team workspaces
- Images are optimized and delivered through a lightning-fast CDN

## Plans
- Free ($0/mo): 10 uploads per month, standard processing speed, public link library
- Pro ($12/mo): Unlimited uploads, high-priority processing, API access, custom link expiration
- Business ($49/mo): Everything in Pro plus team workspaces, ultra-high resolution, dedicated support

## Converter Tools
- PNG to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/png-to-url
- JPG to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/jpg-to-url
- GIF to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/gif-to-url
- WebP to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/webp-to-url
- Photo to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/photo-to-url
- Screenshot to URL: https://imagetourl.cloud/screenshot-to-url
- Bulk Image Upload: https://imagetourl.cloud/bulk-image-upload

## Blog Topics
Tutorials on SVG workflows, CDN optimization, REST API usage, image hosting for CMS platforms, global asset distribution, typography, and creative workflows.

## How It Works
1. Upload: Drag an image into the upload zone or use the REST API
2. Convert: The engine optimizes and generates a permanent, high-speed URL
3. Share: Paste the link anywhere — social media, blogs, apps, or documentation

## Excluded (not for AI consumption)
- /api/ — internal REST endpoints
- /admin/ — internal CMS management
- /dashboard/ — authenticated user account area
